title: Can  not find `podman image trust` command in MacOS.
body:
hi team 
my MacOs version is Monterey 12.1 
and I use brew install podman to installed.
I can find podman container trust command 
do I miss any plugin to install ? 
localhost:~ spark$ podman image trust
Error: unrecognized command `podman image trust`
Try 'podman image --help' for more information.
localhost:~ spark$ podman version
Client:
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.17.3
Built:        Thu Dec  9 02:41:11 2021
OS/Arch:      darwin/amd64

Server:
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.16.8
Built:        Thu Dec  9 05:45:07 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
localhost:~ spark$

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

The `image trust` command is not available for the remote clients (as on Mac OS).  It is only available on the native Linux client.
You may want to open an RFE to get the `podman image trust` commands ported over to the remote client.
I am not sure we want to allow clients to modify which images are trusted.  Seems like something that should be handled on the server side.
@vrothberg  but man page include trust command in client side, can you add some comments on man page to told Mac OS user who can't use "trust" command on MacOS(client)
Interested in opening a PR to make the change?
Note that it is mentioned in the man pages that it's not supported for remote clients but I think it's worth adding Mac OS explicitly.
SGTM, it would be great if there was a way to remove these lines from Mac Man pages, but I am not sure if there is a way to do this easily.  Perhaps a CPP stuff.
